/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--version-script="/home/hviswan/Documents/Neural-Monte-Carlo-Fluid-Simulation/bindings/zombie_3d_surface/deps/tbb/src/tbbmalloc/def/lin64-tbbmalloc.def" -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -L/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -shared -Wl,-soname,libtbbmalloc.so.2 -o ../../../../gnu_10.5_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc.so.2.16 CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/backref.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/frontend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/large_objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/tbbmalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/__/tbb/itt_notify.cpp.o  -ldl
